overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle navigating a multi-lane highway during a severe nighttime rainstorm with extremely low visibility. The driver accelerates under concrete overpasses before encountering dense fog that reduces speed to a crawl, following holographic navigation signs through the whiteout conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete overpass structures

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 38 km/h under concrete overpass
passing under concrete overpass structure temporarily blocking sky view

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered highway section under concrete overpasses at increasing speed

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars spanning the road
metal guardrail running along the left side of the highway
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights
faded yellow and white lane dividers on the highway surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through a covered highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses. Rain streaks across the windshield while streetlights illuminate the wet asphalt and metal guardrails. The sky is completely obscured by the concrete infrastructure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with palm tree lining during heavy storm

events.description: exits covered overpass into open highway with visible palm trees on both sides
heavy braking as visibility drops due to intensifying rain and fog

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through open highway then braking hard as visibility deteriorates rapidly

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered section into an open highway flanked by palm trees. Heavy rain lashes the windshield as the driver accelerates to high speed before braking sharply as a wall of fog approaches, drastically reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway engulfed in dense fog with near-zero visibility

events.description: entering extreme whiteout conditions with visibility less than 10 meters
vehicle slows to crawling speed of 2-5 km/h due to zero visibility

agents.ego_description: crawling forward at minimal speed through dense fog following holographic navigation markers

entered.detail: futuristic blue and red holographic sign floating above the road providing navigation guidance

segments.scene_description: The highway disappears into a dense whiteout fog that reduces visibility to near zero. The vehicle crawls forward at minimal speed, following a glowing holographic navigation sign that materializes in the fog ahead. Rain continues to pour heavily, creating a disorienting environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-shrouded highway with holographic signage navigation

events.description: slight acceleration to 20 km/h as visibility marginally improves
passing holographic sign structure on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through persistent dense fog following holographic waypoints and occasional palm tree silhouettes

entered.detail: palm trees reappearing as faint silhouettes through the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the persistent dense fog with slightly improved visibility, allowing faint silhouettes of palm trees to reappear. The driver follows the holographic navigation sign which gradually moves from center to the right as the vehicle passes it, maintaining a cautious slow speed through the treacherous conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from the sheltered confines of a concrete highway into a disorienting, rain-soaked whiteout. It begins by accelerating through a covered section beneath massive concrete overpasses, where streetlights reflect off wet asphalt and rain streaks the windshield. As the vehicle emerges from the infrastructure into the open air, the scene expands to reveal palm trees lining the highway before the driver brakes sharply upon encountering a wall of dense fog. The environment then shifts into a complete whiteout that reduces visibility to near zero, forcing the vehicle to crawl forward. Finally, the camera follows a glowing holographic navigation sign that materializes through the heavy pour, guiding the way through the blinding mist.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense nocturnal fog that slowly reveals the silhouettes of a coastal urban environment. It begins with the vehicle navigating a thick whiteout, where visibility is severely limited and the atmosphere remains oppressive. As the car maintains a cautious speed, the fog slightly thins, allowing the faint, dark shapes of palm trees to emerge from the haze along the roadside. The scene then shifts focus to a glowing holographic navigation sign that guides the driver, gradually drifting from the center of the frame to the right as the vehicle passes it.
